bibl.title: Vidyāpariṇayanāṭaka
Vidyāpariṇāma (NCC vol. 29, 132)
bibl.note: Philosophical allegorial play (see Raghavan, intro to Śāhendravilāsa pg. 29)
Written during the reign of Serfoji (Raghavan, intro to Śāhendravilāsa pg. 29)
Has a commentary by the author Vedakavīśvara

'An allegorical drama like the Prabodhacandrodaya, in 7 acts. The plot is based on the marriage between the Jīvātman or the individual soul and Vidyā or spiritual wisdom. The drama is said to have been enacted on the occasion of the festival of goddess Ānandavallī, worshipped in Tanjore. See S. N. Dasgupta, HSL. Classical Period, Vol. I. pp. 486. 764.' (NCC vol. 31, 147)
